productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Lace-up Oxfords Black Formal Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these shoes from hush puppies are made for you. These lace-up oxfords sporty outsole features patented Bounce® technology.Team these with jeans or chinos and tees for a cool look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for added style Lace-ups for a snug Fit Lightly padded collar for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed with genuine sheepskin lining for all day comfort EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Outsole with Bounce® technology provides advanced shock absorption and energy return for all-day comfort Horizontal groove pattern for better grip Slight heel for ergonomic comfort Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
